category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes OpenFAST as whole-turbine and FAST.Farm wind farm simulation code.
source_facts.description: NREL-supported OpenFAST whole-turbine simulation code
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is OpenFAST/openfast.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README states the full documentation is available at openfast.readthedocs.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/openfast/openfast, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes physics-based engineering simulation for wind turbines and wind farms.
